item.title: ‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ ‎ ‎早朝で腹も減り ‎コンビニで買った握り飯を… ‎ ‎『お父さん、待って！』 ‎ ‎『…
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [97話]ケントゥリア - 暗森透 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ケントゥリア 暗森透 <毎週月曜更新！最…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[97話]ケントゥリア - 暗森透 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ケントゥリア 暗森透 <毎週月曜更新！最新2話無料>奴隷船に密航者として、潜り込んだユリアンは、奴隷100人と大陸に向かい、自由を切望するのだが――……!?新時代ダークファンタジーバトル連載!! [JC9巻発売中]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[97話]ケントゥリア - 暗森透 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ケントゥリア 暗森透 <毎週月曜更新！最新2話無料>奴隷船に密航者として、潜り込んだユリアンは、奴隷100人と大陸に向かい、自由を切望するのだが――……!?新時代ダークファンタジーバトル連載!! [JC9巻発売中]

item.title: #ヤニねこ 佐藤ヤニ子 作画、顔、以外全てが汚いアニメだと思いますw 獣人という可愛い創作キャラをここまでする発想は尊敬…

#ヤニ子 #タバコ #絵描きさんと繋がりたい

item.title: Air quality alerts were in effect across the Great Lakes reg…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Air quality alerts were in effect across the Great Lakes region, as the path of the Canadian wildfire smoke was expected to shift by the hour on Sunday. Conditions were expected to change little on Monday.
item.content:encoded: Air quality alerts were in effect across the Great Lakes region, as the path of the Canadian wildfire smoke was expected to shift by the hour on Sunday. Conditions were expected to change little on Monday.

item.title: イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築
item.content:encoded:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Wh…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 社説：国旗損壊処罰法の成立 内心まで踏み込む悪法だ | 毎日新聞 mainichi.jp/articles/202...…
item.author: 地平社 (@chiheisha.bsky.social)
item.description:
社説：国旗損壊処罰法の成立　内心まで踏み込む悪法だ | 毎日新聞 mainichi.jp/articles/202...

〈高市早苗首相肝いりの政策だ。かつて「国家の存立基盤を損なう」と主張していた。個人の権利よりも、統制が優先される国家体制への一歩となりかねない…廃止に向けた議論を直ちに始めるべきだ〉
item.content:encoded:
社説：国旗損壊処罰法の成立　内心まで踏み込む悪法だ | 毎日新聞 mainichi.jp/articles/202...

〈高市早苗首相肝いりの政策だ。かつて「国家の存立基盤を損なう」と主張していた。個人の権利よりも、統制が優先される国家体制への一歩となりかねない…廃止に向けた議論を直ちに始めるべきだ〉

item.title: 7月19日 日曜日☁☀️ 室温33.2℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 暑い🫠 外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠 エアコン取り…
item.author: 菊理（くくり） (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー E2Eテストをユニットテスト並みの実行時間に — Playwright並列化とGitHub Acti…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
E2Eテストをユニットテスト並みの実行時間に — Playwright並列化とGitHub Actionsチューニングの実践

私たちのチームでは、品質管理システム（QMS）SaaS「QMSmart」の開発で、約 100 spec / 140 テストケースの E2E テストを、PR ごとに CI で自動実行し、wall-clock 6〜8 分で完走させる運用が回っています。これはユニットテスト（Vitest）の CI とほぼ同じ所要時間です。 本記事では、これを実現するために行った 並列...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
E2Eテストをユニットテスト並みの実行時間に — Playwright並列化とGitHub Actionsチューニングの実践

私たちのチームでは、品質管理システム（QMS）SaaS「QMSmart」の開発で、約 100 spec / 140 テストケースの E2E テストを、PR ごとに CI で自動実行し、wall-clock 6〜8 分で完走させる運用が回っています。これはユニットテスト（Vitest）の CI とほぼ同じ所要時間です。 本記事では、これを実現するために行った 並列...

item.title: Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife S…
item.author: Paul van der Meer (@paulvandermeer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO
item.content:encoded:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO

item.title: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblica…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them. n.pr/4wmcLYH
item.content:encoded: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them. n.pr/4wmcLYH

item.title: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is f…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is filled with bangers! This is the track "PwP" by PHAZE, and it's a bop! The music is awesome, the vocalist floats on the beat! The chart has a comfortable flow to it, and the double hold notes are super satisfying to hit! It's a fun track!
item.content:encoded: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is filled with bangers! This is the track "PwP" by PHAZE, and it's a bop! The music is awesome, the vocalist floats on the beat! The chart has a comfortable flow to it, and the double hold notes are super satisfying to hit! It's a fun track!

item.title: Governments have spent over a century relying on taxes from …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
Governments have spent over a century relying on taxes from human labor. What happens when AI starts doing the work instead? Read more: bloom.bg/4fmzEUu

📷️: Patrick T. Fallon/AFP/Getty Images
item.content:encoded:
Governments have spent over a century relying on taxes from human labor. What happens when AI starts doing the work instead? Read more: bloom.bg/4fmzEUu

📷️: Patrick T. Fallon/AFP/Getty Images

item.title: A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org

item.title: Morning coffee on the front porch while listening to the pit…
item.author: The Slim Dude 🇨🇦 (@slimdude.ca)
item.description: Morning coffee on the front porch while listening to the pitter patter of the rain, the birds singing and the buzzing of the hummingbirds.
item.content:encoded: Morning coffee on the front porch while listening to the pitter patter of the rain, the birds singing and the buzzing of the hummingbirds.

item.title: Happy Sunday. Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being …
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy Sunday.
Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being with the sea. Roiling, it shapes, our giver to be. The connection, unntrolled, in constant change of state. Our behavior, intertwined, the common fate.
#Stunday #photography #coloraday #orangesun #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod
item.content:encoded:
Happy Sunday.
Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being with the sea. Roiling, it shapes, our giver to be. The connection, unntrolled, in constant change of state. Our behavior, intertwined, the common fate.
#Stunday #photography #coloraday #orangesun #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod

item.title: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't…
item.author: Sara Century (@saracentury.bsky.social)
item.description: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't choose as a kid but when people are like 40 and still going, "well assigned reading turned me off from reading" it's like, ok but you're 40. No one has assigned you a book in like 20 years.
item.content:encoded: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't choose as a kid but when people are like 40 and still going, "well assigned reading turned me off from reading" it's like, ok but you're 40. No one has assigned you a book in like 20 years.

item.title: *Taps claws on skyscraper glass* Hey, come on out, before I…
item.author: Switch 🐾 🔜 MP (@switchmegawolf.bsky.social)

*Taps claws on skyscraper glass*

Hey, come on out, before I reach in. :3 ☠️

*Taps claws on skyscraper glass*

Hey, come on out, before I reach in. :3 ☠️

item.title: On Wednesday, we hiked to Piegan Pass, one of our fave trail…
item.author: Becky Lomax (@beckyjlomax.bsky.social)
item.description:
On Wednesday, we hiked to Piegan Pass, one of our fave trails for wildflowers, but added on an adventure to peer down on snowfields and ice melting into different colored tarns.

Glacier National Park
#nationalparks #hiking #trails #glaciers #mountains #lakes #Montana
item.content:encoded:
On Wednesday, we hiked to Piegan Pass, one of our fave trails for wildflowers, but added on an adventure to peer down on snowfields and ice melting into different colored tarns.

Glacier National Park
#nationalparks #hiking #trails #glaciers #mountains #lakes #Montana

item.title: Epstein survivor Virginia Roberts Giuffre was abused as a ch…
item.author: Alicia Menendez (@aliciamenendezz.bsky.social)
item.description:
Epstein survivor Virginia Roberts Giuffre was abused as a child and her instinct was to protect her younger brother Sky Roberts

Now, Sky and his wife Amanda are fighting to protect abuse victims by campaigning to pass Virginia’s Law, to remove the statute of limitations on child sexual abuse cases
item.content:encoded:
Epstein survivor Virginia Roberts Giuffre was abused as a child and her instinct was to protect her younger brother Sky Roberts

Now, Sky and his wife Amanda are fighting to protect abuse victims by campaigning to pass Virginia’s Law, to remove the statute of limitations on child sexual abuse cases

item.title: I can’t wait for the half time show in the World Cup final. …
item.author: Ally Niemi (aye, me) (@allyniemi1874.bsky.social)
item.description:
I can’t wait for the half time show in the World Cup final.

Said no actual football fan ever. Ridiculous shite and there’s no place for it in football.
item.content:encoded:
I can’t wait for the half time show in the World Cup final.

Said no actual football fan ever. Ridiculous shite and there’s no place for it in football.

item.title: Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.
item.content:encoded:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.
